jsonLd.description:
MONDAY DATING CLUB 
No pressure, no speed dating, no apps.
Join us from 7pm for our monthly over 30’s dating night on Monday 27th April
Focusing on creating a positive, relaxed, and enjoyable experience for like-minded people, Dunkertons are hosting a fantastic opportunity for singles to meet and mingle in a pressure-free atmosphere.
Should you wish to exchange details with anybody it’s totally up to you. It is all about meeting new faces and having fun.
* Complimentary Drink with Ticket 
*Over 30s
*Please aim to arrive for 19:00
*Please book your ticket below
IMPORTANT INFO:
Attendees must be age 30 years or older.
We will be checking IDs of people who look young on the night, if you are under 18 years you will be asked to leave.
No pets.
Our bar accepts card payments only. No cash please.
This event takes place in a marquee, please dress accordingly.
Cars left onsite overnight at owners’ risk
Find us at: Dunkertons, Dowdeswell Park. London Road, Cheltenham, GL52 6UT.
Free Parking

jsonLd.name: ABBA Arrival - Friday 8th May
jsonLd.description:
Dunkertons Presents:
ABBA Arrival! An ABBA Tribute Night
Friday 8 May┃Doors 6:30pm
Voted “Best ABBA Show” and “Most Authentic ABBA Show” for 13 consecutive years by the Official ABBA Fan Club, ARRIVAL® are widely regarded as one of the most respected and successful ABBA tribute shows in the world today.
Since forming in 1995, ARRIVAL have toured internationally, selling out stadiums, arenas, theatres, and concert halls in over 39 countries worldwide. Their spectacular performances have also featured on international TV and radio across the USA, India, China, and beyond entertaining millions of ABBA fans across the globe.

“Simply The Best ABBA Show…” – The Stage


“The Finest Tribute Act In The UK…” – Vice Magazine


“The Best ABBA Tribute Act in the World!” – The BBC


“Brilliant… Great!!” – ITV’s This Morning


“Spot On… Loved them!!” – Rick Astley


ARRIVAL® – The Hits of ABBA is more than a tribute show. It’s a spectacular celebration of one of the greatest pop bands of all time.
Website: www.abba-arrival.co.uk
Facebook: @arrivalukInstagram: @arrival_ukTikTok: @ARRIVALTHE HITSOFABBA
Early bird tickets £20
Standard tickets £25
Ages 18+ only. 
Find us: Dunkertons, Dowdeswell Park, London Road, Cheltenham, GL52 6UT
Ticket Terms & Conditions and Event/Venue Information - Please Read Before Booking
Tickets 


Tickets are strictly non-refundable. Ensure you can attend before booking.


QR code tickets will be emailed after purchase; these will be required for entry.


Age Restriction


This is an adults-only event. All attendees must be 18 years or older.


IDs will be checked by the event team.


Entry and Arrival

Arrive as close to the opening time as possible to avoid delays.
If tickets were booked for a group, all members must arrive together. Otherwise, you will need to wait until the entire group is present for entry.

Venue Information


There may be photographers and content creators at the event. By booking a ticket, you consent to yourself and anyone attending with you, appearing in photos and videos, which may be used in promotional materials for Dunkertons and affiliated businesses.


No pets allowed at this event.

This is not a seated event.

Card payments only at the bar.


Cars can be left overnight at the overflow car park at the owner's risk.

Dress according to the weather; DJs, dancefloor, and food vendors are undercover. Smoking areas and toilets are outside.

Smoking or vaping is prohibited in the marquees; use designated smoking areas.


We have a zero-tolerance policy for inappropriate behaviour of any kind, including verbal abuse toward other attendees and members of our staff. Violators will have their tickets cancelled with no refunds before the event or be asked to leave on the night.


Communication


We may contact you via email or phone with information regarding the event.


Event Cancellations


If the event is cancelled, a full refund will be provided.

**Dunkertons Presents:**

**ABBA Arrival! An ABBA Tribute Night**

**Friday 8 May┃Doors 6:30pm**

Voted “Best ABBA Show” and “Most Authentic ABBA Show” for 13 consecutive years by the Official ABBA Fan Club, ARRIVAL® are widely regarded as one of the most respected and successful ABBA tribute shows in the world today.

Their spectacular performances have also featured on international TV and radio across the USA, India, China, and beyond entertaining millions of ABBA fans across the globe.

jsonLd.description:
The ultimate inclusive party




Born from the imaginations of Jemma Bolt & Denise Van Outen, Discoliscious isn’t just a party, it’s a full-blown celebration of joy, freedom, and everyone on the dancefloor. Since launching in 2023, it’s exploded into a global phenomenon, lighting up cities worldwide with unforgettable nights, from show-stopping corporate events to a headline residency at the world’s biggest club in Ibiza. Glittering crowds, iconic music, electric energy, and pure feel-good vibes from start to finish ,this is a party you’ll be talking about long after the lights come up. 


Denise Van Outen
DVO needs no intro, a household name with a career that has stood the test of time thanks to her diverse range of talent, an actress in TV and film, a Broadway star, a TV presenter, talent show judge and now adding DJ and Discoliscious Co-founder into the mix!Denise has played the top UK festivals from Isle of Wight Festival to Cambridge Club fest and DJ’d for luxury brands all over the world.


Jemma Bolt
Jemma has had quite a colourful career, from her stage debut at just 3 years old, she’s gone on to appear in movies, popped up in TV shows and dabbled in reality TV. She’s been a podcaster, had her own radio show and you’ll hear her voice crop up all over the place as one of the UK’s leading female voice over artists! 2023 saw the start of a new adventure ‘DISCOLISCIOUS’ with friend and business partner Denise Van Outen. Jemma knows how to read and room and has a very adaptive manner to her DJ sets which have taken her all over the world from NYC to Newport - whatever the vibe is, be it chilled balearic, french electro, 90’s pop anthems or club classics, she’s got you covered! She’s played at some of the biggest music festivals including Glastonbury, Camp Bestival, Wilderness and Isle of Wight Festival, the most renowned clubs including, Fabric London, The Cross and Ministry of Sound in the UK and played at brand new super club opening ‘UNVRS’ and has a Thursday night ‘Discoliscious’ residency in the ‘Wild Corner’ at the number one club in the world, Hi Ibiza!

Laura Pradelskal
Meet DJ Laura Pradelska an Actor, Voiceover artist, radio host and DJ with a global fan base. Best known for playing fan favourite character ‘Quaithe’ on HBO’s ‘Game of Thrones’ , Laura’s sets are known for their unique blend of dance, Disco, house music and feel good vibes. She has performed at prestigious events such as the Monaco Grand Prix, The Fashion Awards, Royal Ascot, Cannes Film Fest, and Fashion Weeks around the world.  

Laura has built strong relationships with various residencies, brands, and venues. Some of the notable names she has worked with include Soho Houses, Amano Group Berlin, Home House, The Four Seasons, Patron, Playboy, Lulu Guinness, Malone Souliers, West Contemporary Gallery, Pink Ribbon Foundation among many others.  

In addition to her live performances, Laura hosts two weekly radio shows based on music called 'Around The With The Lallas' on Resonance FM 104.4 and ‘Come on dance with me’ on Point Blank radio. She also runs a successful podcast called 'DJ Diaries', where she shares her experiences and insights from her career and interviews DJ’s in addition to being the voice of luxury brands.


Ages 18+ only. 
Doors:18:30
Find us: Dunkertons, Dowdeswell Park, London Road, Cheltenham, GL52 6UT

Ticket Booking Policy
·         Tickets are non-transferable and must not be resold.
·         Entry will be denied to anyone without a valid ID matching the booking name.
·         Tickets are strictly non-refundable. Ensure you can attend before booking.
·         QR code tickets will be emailed after purchase; these will be required for entry.
·

·         This is an adults-only event. All attendees must be 18 years or older.
·         IDs will be checked by the event team.
Entry and Arrival
·         Arrive as close to the opening time as possible to avoid delays.
·         If tickets were booked for a group, all members must arrive together. Otherwise, you will need to wait until the entire group is present for entry.
There may be photographers and content creators at the event. By booking a ticket, you consent to yourself and anyone attending with you,  appearing in photos and videos, which may be used in promotional materials for Dunkertons and affiliated businesses.
Venue Rules
·         No pets allowed.
·         Card payments only at the bar.
·         Limited car parking is available at the Dunkertons overflow car park; follow signs. Use taxis or car share if possible due to restricted parking.
·         Cars can be left overnight at the overflow car park at the owner's risk.

·         Smoking or vaping is prohibited in the marquee; use designated smoking areas.
·         The use or sale of drugs is strictly forbidden. Anyone found in violation will be immediately removed from the event.
·         We have a zero-tolerance policy for inappropriate behaviour of any kind, including verbal abuse toward other attendees and members of our staff. Violators will have their tickets cancelled with no refunds before the event or be asked to leave on the night.
